---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---
<style>
.html-widget {
    width: 100vw !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
}
body { margin: 0; }
</style>

```{r, include=FALSE}
# # load libraries and test data
library(here)

source(here("MOSAIC", "charts", "data_prep.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```


```{r}
# Prep for chart 2

all_subgroups <- unique(low_birthweight$subgroup)

# Create ordered categories for RATES (descending by rate)
rate_order <- low_birthweight_chart2 %>%
  arrange(desc(rate)) %>%
  pull(subgroup)

# Create ordered categories for COUNTS (descending by count)
count_order <- low_birthweight_chart2 %>%
  arrange(desc(count)) %>%
  pull(subgroup)

# Get unique groups for color assignment
groups <- unique(low_birthweight_chart2$group)


# Create series data for RATES with colors
series_data_rates <- low_birthweight_chart2 %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  map(function(df) {
    data_points <- map(1:nrow(df), function(i) {
      x_index <- which(rate_order == df$subgroup[i]) - 1
      list(
        x = unname(x_index),
        y = df$rate[i],
        name = df$subgroup[i]
      )
    })
    
    # Assign color based on group
    series_color <- if(df$group[1] == "ASIAN SUBGROUPS") {
      base_colors[["asian subgroups"]]
    } else if(df$group[1] == "ASIAN TOTAL") {
      base_colors[["asian total"]]
    } else {
      base_colors[["other"]]  # This catches aian, latino, black, white, nhpi, etc.
    }
    
    list(
      name = df$group[1],
      data = data_points,
      id = paste0("rates-", df$group[1]),
      color = series_color
    )
  })

# Create series data for COUNTS with same colors
series_data_counts <- low_birthweight_chart2 %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  group_split() %>%
  map(function(df) {
    data_points <- map(1:nrow(df), function(i) {
      x_index <- which(count_order == df$subgroup[i]) - 1
      list(
        x = unname(x_index),
        y = df$count[i],
        name = df$subgroup[i]
      )
    })
    
    # Assign same color based on group
    series_color <- if(df$group[1] == "ASIAN SUBGROUPS") {
      base_colors[["asian subgroups"]]
    } else if(df$group[1] == "ASIAN TOTAL") {
      base_colors[["asian total"]]
    } else {
      base_colors[["other"]]  # This catches aian, latino, black, white, nhpi, etc.
    }
    
    list(
      name = df$group[1],
      data = data_points,
      id = paste0("counts-", df$group[1]),
      visible = FALSE,
      color = series_color
    )
  })


```

```{r}
# Create chart 2 
hc <- highchart() %>%
  hc_chart(
    type = "bar",
    reflow = TRUE,
    events = list(
      load = htmlwidgets::JS(sprintf(paste0("
        function() {
          var chart = this;
          var rateOrder = %s;
          var countOrder = %s;
          
          // Create toggle button
          chart.customToggleButton = chart.renderer.button(
            'Show Counts',
            chart.chartWidth - 106,           
            chart.chartHeight / 2 - 50,       
            function() {
              var showingRates = true;
              
              // Check if rates are currently visible
              chart.series.forEach(function(s) {
                if (s.userOptions.id && s.userOptions.id.startsWith('rates-')) {
                  showingRates = s.visible;
                }
              });
              
              // Toggle all series and update x-axis
              chart.series.forEach(function(s) {
                if (s.userOptions.id) {
                  if (showingRates) {
                    // Switch to counts
                    if (s.userOptions.id.startsWith('rates-')) {
                      s.update({showInLegend: false}, false);
                      s.hide();
                    } else if (s.userOptions.id.startsWith('counts-')) {
                      s.update({showInLegend: true}, false);
                      s.show();
                    }
                  } else {
                    // Switch to rates
                    if (s.userOptions.id.startsWith('counts-')) {
                      s.update({showInLegend: false}, false);
                      s.hide();
                    } else if (s.userOptions.id.startsWith('rates-')) {
                      s.update({showInLegend: true}, false);
                      s.show();
                    }
                  }
                }
              });
              
              // Update button text, y-axis, x-axis categories, and data label formatter
              if (showingRates) {
                chart.customToggleButton.attr({text: 'Show Rates'});
                chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'COUNT' }, false); 
                chart.xAxis[0].update({categories: countOrder}, false);
                chart.yAxis[0].removePlotLine('state-average-line');
                
                chart.update({
                  plotOptions: {
                    bar: {
                      dataLabels: {
                        formatter: function() {
                          return Highcharts.numberFormat(this.y, 0, '.', ',');
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }, true);
                
              } else {
                chart.customToggleButton.attr({text: 'Show Counts'});
                chart.yAxis[0].setTitle({ text: 'RATE' }, false); 
                chart.xAxis[0].update({categories: rateOrder}, false);
                chart.yAxis[0].addPlotLine({
                  id: 'state-average-line',
                  value: %s,
                  color: '%s',
                  width: 2,
                  dashStyle: 'ShortDash',
                  label: {style: {fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '0.8em'}, text: 'STATE AVERAGE: %s', align: 'left', rotation: 0, y: -8, x: 5},
                  zIndex: 5
                });
                
                chart.update({
                  plotOptions: {
                    bar: {
                      dataLabels: {
                        formatter: function() {
                          return this.y;
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }, true);
              } 
              
              // Remove the chart.redraw() call since we're now using redraw: true in update
            },
            {
              fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
              stroke: '", rc_blue, "' ,
              style: { color: '", rc_white, "' },  // Add this so font color persists
              'stroke-width': 1,
              r: 3,
              padding: 8
            },
            {
              fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
              style: { color: '", rc_white, "' }  // Add this so font color persists in hover state
            },
            {
              fill: '", rc_blue, "' ,
              style: { color: '", rc_white, "' }  // Add this so font color persists in active/pressed state
            }
          )
          .css({
            color: '", rc_white, "'
          })
          .attr({ zIndex: 7 })  // Add this line to put on top of gridlines
          .add();
          
          // Add event listener to reposition on redraw/resize
          Highcharts.addEvent(chart, 'redraw', function() {
            if (chart.customToggleButton) {
              var buttonWidth = chart.customToggleButton.getBBox().width;
              var rightEdge = chart.chartWidth - chart.spacing[1];
              chart.customToggleButton.attr({
                x: rightEdge - buttonWidth
              });
            }
          });
          
          // Initial positioning
          var buttonWidth = chart.customToggleButton.getBBox().width;
          var rightEdge = chart.chartWidth - chart.spacing[1];
          chart.customToggleButton.attr({
            x: rightEdge - buttonWidth
          });
              }
      "), 
      jsonlite::toJSON(rate_order), # rate order
      jsonlite::toJSON(count_order), # count order
      total_rate_bw, # value
      rc_black, # color
      total_rate_bw) # state average
      ))) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    bar = list(
      dataLabels = list(
        enabled = TRUE,
        align = "right",
        inside = FALSE,
        style = list(color = "black")),
      pointWidth = 20,
      grouping = FALSE,
      pointPadding = 0,
      groupPadding = 0.1),
    series = 
      list(enableMouseTracking=FALSE), # removes all highlighting from hovering over bars and legend groups
      clip = FALSE) %>%
  hc_xAxis(
    categories = rate_order,
    labels = list(
      enabled = TRUE
    ),
    gridLineWidth = 1,
    gridLineColor = '#e6e6e6') %>%
  hc_yAxis(
    title = list(text = "RATE"),
    labels=list(enabled=FALSE), # remove labels from rate axis
    gridLineWidth=0,
    offset = 0,
    plotLines = list(
      list(
        id = 'state-average-line',
        value = total_rate_bw,
        color = rc_black,
        width = 2,
        dashStyle = 'ShortDash',
        label = list(
          style=list(fontWeight='bold', fontSize='0.8em'),
          text = paste('STATE AVERAGE:', total_rate_bw), 
          align = 'left', 
          rotation=0, y=-8, x=5),
        zIndex = 5
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_legend(
    enabled = TRUE,
    verticalAlign = "top",
    margin = 20
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(enabled = FALSE) %>%
  hc_title(
    text = "Low Birthweight by Race/Ethnicity",
    align = "center") %>% 
  hc_subtitle(
    text = "Toggle groups on/off by clicking the legend labels below",
    align = "center") %>%
  hc_add_theme(custom_theme)

# Add RATES series (visible by default)
for (series in series_data_rates) {
  hc <- hc %>% hc_add_series(
    name = series$name,
    data = series$data,
    id = series$id,
    color = series$color,  # Use pre-assigned color
    dataLabels = list(
      formatter = JS("function() { return this.y; }")
    )
  )
}

# Add COUNTS series (hidden by default)
for (series in series_data_counts) {
  hc <- hc %>% hc_add_series(
    name = series$name,
    data = series$data,
    id = series$id,
    visible = FALSE,
    showInLegend = FALSE,
    color = series$color,  # Use pre-assigned color
    dataLabels = list(
      formatter = JS("function() { return this.y.toLocaleString('en-US'); }")
    )
  )
}

# Wrap with constrained width
htmltools::tagList(
  htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "chart-wrapper",
    style = "max-width: 1200px; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto;",
    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "chart-container",
      style = "height: auto; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ccc;",
      hc
    )
  ),
  htmltools::tags$script(HTML("
    function resizeChart() {
      if (typeof Highcharts !== 'undefined' && Highcharts.charts.length > 0) {
        Highcharts.charts.forEach(function(chart) {
          if (chart) {
            var wrapper = document.querySelector('.chart-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
              var targetWidth = wrapper.offsetWidth - 40;
              chart.setSize(targetWidth, null, false);
            }
          }
        });
      }
    }
    
    setTimeout(resizeChart, 100);
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeChart);
  "))
)

```
